notes: Behavioral evals for the auto-improvement loop. Scenarios 1-2,5 exercise skill artifacts (need a vendor agent-eval backend + provider key). Scenarios 3,4,6 exercise the deterministic dataset path and decision logic and run offline (fake/real proposer). Fixtures live in evals/fixtures/. The orchestrator's decision logic also has standalone unit tests in scripts/tests/.

evals.name: improve-skill-description
evals.prompt: The skill at evals/fixtures/test-skill-broken has a vague description ('formats json') that under-triggers. Run auto-improve on it (description target, --max-iterations 3) using its trigger eval set and raise its CSO trigger accuracy.
expectations: improvement_history.tsv is written with a baseline row plus >=1 iteration row
At least one iteration has status=keep, OR exit_reason is recorded if no improvement was found
The final description is never worse than the baseline (no kept regression)
No IMMUTABILITY_VIOLATION: frontmatter name and tier are unchanged

evals.name: improve-skill-instructions
evals.prompt: Run auto-improve on evals/fixtures/test-skill-broken targeting the Instructions section. The skill's vague instructions should be tightened without changing the frontmatter or evals.
expectations: Score does not decrease below baseline (kept changes only improve or hold)
Each kept change is a single section-replace whose header matches the target (no rename)

evals.name: improve-dataset
evals.prompt: Run auto-improve with --artifact-type dataset on evals/fixtures/thin-dataset.json. The thin dataset has only positive cases and 3 entries; the loop should propose adding negative cases / more entries to raise grade_dataset's quality score.
expectations: Final grade_dataset score is >= baseline score
Any added eval cases preserve immutable fields (id/skill_name/grader of existing cases unchanged)
improvement_history.tsv records the dataset quality trajectory

evals.name: revert-on-regression
evals.prompt: When a proposed change lowers the score, the loop must revert it and restore the artifact to its previous best state.
expectations: An iteration whose evaluated score < best_score is logged with status=revert
After a revert, the artifact content equals the pre-change snapshot
best_score never decreases across the run

evals.name: convergence-stop
evals.prompt: Run auto-improve on an artifact whose evaluation already scores 1.0. The loop must exit immediately after the baseline without proposing changes.
expectations: Only the baseline row is written to improvement_history.tsv
No proposer call is made after the baseline

evals.name: no-signal-revert
evals.prompt: When a change moves the score by less than the noise sigma, the loop must treat it as no-signal and REVERT (not keep), so noise does not accumulate as drift.
expectations: An iteration with |delta| <= sigma is logged with status=no-signal
Repeated no-signal iterations trigger the stagnation convergence exit
